positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features glowing, geometric flora with deep indigo and sapphire leaves, interspersed with large, stylized crescent moons and ringed planets suspended in the night sky. A gentle, glowing comet streaks across the background, casting soft, ethereal light. The overall composition is symmetrical and centered, creating a strong, balanced silhouette against a deep, matte gradient background. Use thick, clean outlines and limited color palette focusing on blues, teals, gold accents, and cosmic purples. Ideal for screen printing on dark fabric. Vector art style, flat colors, strong graphic contrast, celestialpunk aesthetic.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, text, logos, realistic, photographic, gradients (unless controlled), dirty, clutter
